name: Tekkamon

signature_move.name: Zandenken
signature_move.description: Cuts the enemy's configuration data in half with its electrified sword.

description: A Digimon said to have been created by an evil hacker to destroy programs, in opposition to the "Net Keeper" Giromon . It wears a mask made of iron, and glares at its enemies with sharp eyes. Its Special Moves are cutting the enemy's configuration data in half with a terrifyingly sharp sword ( Zandenken ), and flinging itself after turning into a pachinko ball ( Skull Stand ).
